cards.title: Stormcaller Matriarch

ability.name: Ethereal Gale
ability.text: Flying. When you play a spell, give this unit +1 Attack and draw a card.

cards.image_prompt: A majestic harpylike matriarch with iridescent indigo wings hovering amidst a turbulent storm, glowing ethereal purple lightning crackling around her outstretched hands, flowing tattered robes, cinematic dark fantasy style, dramatic backlight, high detail, 3:4 aspect ratio.
cards.image_notes: Avoid saturated blue tones, prioritize deep purples and grays. Sharp focus on eyes and wing texture. No text, no borders, hyper-realistic, dark atmospheric lighting.
